title: Sculkling Origin
description: A mod that adds a sculk themed origin!
body:
With the introduction of the new sculk blocks and the warden mob in 1.19, an origin themed around these new features seems like a good addition the Origins mod. Introducing the Sculkling Origin!

 

Powers:

-Burrow: You can phase into sculk related blocks

-Quiet: Sculk sensors don't detect your footsteps

-Sonic Boom: Let the vibrations loose on your target!

-Fire Immunity: You are immune to all types of fire damage 

 

Weaknesses: 

-Tied to the Sculk: You cannot regen unless you are near a sculk catalyst

-Rebirth from Ruins: As a lost soul who was revived by the sculk, you respawn at the closest ancient city

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H6zi06hQlZU&t=10s
